mnemonics.title: SOH-CAH-TOA
mnemonics.content: Sine = Opposite over Hypotenuse, Cosine = Adjacent over Hypotenuse, Tangent = Opposite over Adjacent

acronyms.usage: Used to remember the order of operations when multiplying two binomials

visualTips.visualization: Imagine two vectors as arrows in space, and add them by connecting the tail of one vector to the head of the other

analogies.analogy: The dot product of two vectors is like the amount of 'similarity' between them, similar to how the cosine of the angle between two vectors represents their similarity
